clusters.title: Status parser accepts any process with a worker address flag

member_findings.title: Status parser accepts any process with a worker address flag
member_findings.impact: Changing the filter from the worker-binary regex to a bare substring check means parse_worker_lines will report any local process whose command line contains the worker address argument, including dscli invocations or helper scripts, as a running datasystem worker. When such a process is present, dscli status returns a wrong worker list instead of only real workers.
member_findings.fix: Keep the worker binary validation before extracting the address, or combine the new address-argument check with _WORKER_BIN_RE so a line must identify the datasystem worker executable and contain a valid worker address.
